title: Bhima Devi Temple Complex
tagline: Bhima Devi Temple Complex — spiritual town of Haryana

overview.short: The Bhima Devi Temple Complex, nicknamed Khajuraho of North India for its erotic sculptures, comprises the restored ruins of an ancient Hindu temple dating from between 8th and 11t
overview.description: The Bhima Devi Temple Complex, nicknamed Khajuraho of North India for its erotic sculptures, comprises the restored ruins of an ancient Hindu temple dating from between 8th and 11th century AD, together with the adjacent 17th-century Pinjore gardens (a variant of Mughal gardens), located in Pinjore town in Panchkula district of the state of Haryana, India. The old temple was destroyed by Islamic invaders and the present 8-11th CE temple is likely built on the same place under the old name, and the nearby ancient baoli still has old Hindu pillars. Bhimadevi belongs to the Shakti tradition that

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Yadavindra Gardens
topPlaces.description: Yadavindra Gardens, also known as Pinjore Gardens, is a historic 17th century garden located in Pinjore city of Panchkula district in the Indian state of Haryana. Panchkula city is nearby it.

topPlaces.name: Pinjore
topPlaces.description: Pinjore is a town in Panchkula district in the Indian state of Haryana. This residential 'township', located close to Panchkula, Chandigarh and Solan, is set over 1,800 feet above the sea level in a valley, overlooking the Sivalik Hills.

topPlaces.name: Himshikha
topPlaces.description: Himshikha is a planned, small township located near Pinjore in district Panchkula, Haryana, India, on the Pinjore—Mallah Road. The township was built by the Haryana Housing Board between 1985 and 1989.

topPlaces.name: Kaushalya Dam
topPlaces.description: The Kaushalya Dam (Hindi: कौशल्या बांध) is an earth-fill embankment dam on the Kaushalya river, which is a tributary of Ghaggar-Hakra River (modern remnant of ancient Sarasvati river), in Pinjore of Haryana state, India. It was constructed between 2008 and 2012 with the primary purpose of water supply.

topPlaces.name: Pinjore Aerodrome
topPlaces.description: Pinjore Airfield is being operated as a pilot training institute owned and operated by Haryana Institute of Civil Aviation (HICA) under guidance of Civil Aviation Department, Government of Haryana. The flying school is spread over an area of 96 acres and is located on Pinjore-Baddi main highway near the cities of Kalka and Pinjore in the Panchkula district of the Indian state of Haryana.

topPlaces.name: Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in Panchkula district of Haryana State, India. It is 0.5 kilometres (0.31 mi) away from Panchkula on the Morni Road and its aerial distance from the Bir Shikargah Wildlife Sanctuary is only 3 kilometres (1.9 mi).

topPlaces.name: Kalka
topPlaces.description: Kalka is a city in the Panchkula district of Haryana, India. It is near Panchkula city.

topPlaces.name: Jatayu Conservation Breeding Centre, Pinjore
topPlaces.description: The Jatayu and Sparrow Conservation Breeding Centre (JCBC) is the world's largest facility for the breeding and conservation of Indian vultures and the house sparrow (Passer domesticus). It is located within the Bir Shikargah Wildlife Sanctuary in the town of Pinjore in the State of Haryana, India.

items.note: Yadavindra Gardens, also known as Pinjore Gardens, is a historic 17th century garden located in Pinjore city of Panchkula district in the Indian state of Haryana. Panchkula city is nearby it.

Pinjore is a town in Panchkula district in the Indian state of Haryana. This residential 'township', located close to Panchkula, Chandigarh and Solan, is set over 1,800 feet above the sea level in a valley, overlooking the Sivalik Hills.

Himshikha is a planned, small township located near Pinjore in district Panchkula, Haryana, India, on the Pinjore—Mallah Road. The township was built by the Haryana Housing Board between 1985 and 1989.

The Kaushalya Dam (Hindi: कौशल्या बांध) is an earth-fill embankment dam on the Kaushalya river, which is a tributary of Ghaggar-Hakra River (modern remnant of ancient Sarasvati river), in Pinjore of Haryana state, India. It was constructed between 2008 and 2012 with the primary purpose of water supply.

Pinjore Airfield is being operated as a pilot training institute owned and operated by Haryana Institute of Civil Aviation (HICA) under guidance of Civil Aviation Department, Government of Haryana. The flying school is spread over an area of 96 acres and is located on Pinjore-Baddi main highway near the cities of Kalka and Pinjore in the Panchkula district of the Indian state of Haryana.

Khol Hi-Raitan Wildlife Sanctuary is situated in Panchkula district of Haryana State, India. It is 0.5 kilometres (0.31 mi) away from Panchkula on the Morni Road and its aerial distance from the Bir Shikargah Wildlife Sanctuary is only 3 kilometres (1.9 mi).
Kalka is a city in the Panchkula district of Haryana, India. It is near Panchkula city.

The Jatayu and Sparrow Conservation Breeding Centre (JCBC) is the world's largest facility for the breeding and conservation of Indian vultures and the house sparrow (Passer domesticus). It is located within the Bir Shikargah Wildlife Sanctuary in the town of Pinjore in the State of Haryana, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhima Devi Temple Complex?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhima Devi Temple Complex is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhima Devi Temple Complex?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chandigarh International Airport (18 km) and the nearest railway station is Chandigarh Railway Station (15 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhima Devi Temple Complex?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhima Devi Temple Complex at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhima Devi Temple Complex?
faq.a: Stays in Bhima Devi Temple Complex start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhima Devi Temple Complex?
faq.a: The top attractions are Yadavindra Gardens, Pinjore, Himshikha, Kaushalya Dam, Pinjore Aerodrome.
